markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 28, 2026 6 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 79.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 79.99° on Jun 28, 2026 at 6am EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Ramkumar Ramanathan wins the Ramanathan vs Makk professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Brasov Qualification Round 1 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Ramanathan vs Makk professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Brasov Qualification Round 1 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Ramkumar Ramanathan win the Ramanathan vs Makk: Qualification Round 1 match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.

If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. markets.title: Will Peter Makk win the Ramanathan vs Makk: Qualification Round 1 match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Elly De La Cruz records 1+ stolen bases in Cincinnati vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 1:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Elly De La Cruz is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Elly De La Cruz starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Elly De La Cruz is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Elly De La Cruz is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: Elly De La Cruz: 1+ stolen bases?

Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Bryce Harper is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Bryce Harper starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Bryce Harper is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Bryce Harper is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Bryce Harper: 3+ hits?
